cooked: I would add to this that even on a decent daw, stem splitting is kind of hit or miss, and there is generally some bleed-over of instruments when they cross frequency cutoffs in my experience. The stems on this are pretty clean, I almost wonder if they were even split, or output as separate tracks from the master.
